text: The revelation of the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.
tl: Tanzeelul Kitaabi minal laahil 'Azeezil Hakeem

text: Indeed, We have sent down to you the Book, [O Muḥammad], in truth. So worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion.
tl: Innaaa anzalnaaa ilaikal Kitaaba bilhaqqi fa'budil laaha mukhlisal lahud deen

text: Unquestionably, for Allāh is the pure religion. And those who take protectors besides Him [say], \"We only worship them that they may bring us nearer to Allāh in position.\" Indeed, Allāh will judge between them concerning that over which they differ. Indeed, Allāh does not guide he who is a liar and [confirmed] disbeliever.
tl: Alaa lillaahid deenul khaalis; wallazeenat takhazoo min dooniheee awliyaaa'a maa na'buduhum illaa liyuqar-riboonaaa ilal laahi zulfaa; innal laaha yahkumu baina-hum fee maa hum feehi yakhtalifoon; innal laaha laa yahdee man huwa kaazibun kaffaar

text: If Allāh had intended to take a son, He could have chosen from what He creates whatever He willed. Exalted is He; He is Allāh, the One, the Prevailing.
tl: Law araadal laahu aien yattakhiza waladal lastafaa mimmaa yakhluqu maa yashaaa'; Subhaanahoo Huwal laahul Waahidul Qahhaar

text: He created the heavens and earth in truth. He wraps the night over the day and wraps the day over the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term. Unquestionably, He is the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver.
tl: Khalaqas samaawaati wal-arda bilhaqq; yukawwirul laila 'alan nahaari Wa-yukawwirun nahaara 'alaal laili Wa-sakhkharash shamsa walqamara kulluny yajree li-ajalim musammaa; alaa Huwal 'Azeezul Ghaffaar

text: He created you from one soul. Then He made from it its mate, and He produced for you from the grazing livestock eight mates. He creates you in the wombs of your mothers, creation after creation, within three darknesses. That is Allāh, your Lord; to Him belongs dominion. There is no deity except Him, so how are you averted?
tl: Khalaqakum min nafsinw waahidatin summa ja'ala minhaa zawjahaa Wa-anzala lakum minal an'aami samaani-yata azwaaj; yakhlu-qukum fee butooni ummahaatikum khalqam mim ba'di khalqin fee zulumaatin salaas; zaalikumul laahu Rabbukum lahul mulk; laaa ilaaha illaa Huwa fa-annaa tusrafoon

text: If you disbelieve - indeed, Allāh is Free from need of you. And He does not approve for His servants disbelief. And if you are grateful, He approves [i.e., likes] it for you; and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, and He will inform you about what you used to do. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
tl: In takfuroo fa-innal laaha ghaniyyun 'ankum; Wa-laa yardaa li'ibaadihil kufra Wa-in tashkuroo yardahu lakum; Wa-laa taziru waaziratunw wizra ukhraa; summa ilaa Rabikum marji'ukum fa-yunabbi'ukum bimaa kuntum ta'maloon; innahoo 'aleemum bizaatis sudoor

text: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon his Lord, turning to Him [alone]; then when He bestows on him a favor from Himself, he forgets Him whom he called upon before, and he attributes to Allāh equals to mislead [people] from His way. Say, \"Enjoy your disbelief for a little; indeed, you are of the companions of the Fire.\"
tl: Wa-izaa massal insaana durrun da'aa Rabbahoo muneeban ilaihi summa izaa khawwalahoo ni'matam minhu nasiya maa kaana yad'ooo ilaihi min qablu Wa-ja'ala lillaahi andaadal liyudilla 'an sabeelih; qul tamatta' bikufrika qaleelan innaka min Ashaabin Naar;

text: Is one who is devoutly obedient during periods of the night, prostrating and standing [in prayer], fearing the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord, [like one who does not]? Say, \"Are those who know equal to those who do not know?\" Only they will remember [who are] people of understanding.
tl: Amman huwa qaanitun aanaaa'al laili saajidanw Wa-qaaa'imai yahzarul Aakhirata Wa-yarjoo rahmata Rabbih; qul hal yastawil lazeena ya'lamoona wallazeena laa ya'lamoon; innamaa yatazakkaru ulul albaab

text: Say, \"O My servants who have believed, fear your Lord. For those who do good in this world is good, and the earth of Allāh is spacious. Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account [i.e., limit].\"
tl: Qul yaa-'ibaadil lazeena aamanut taqoo Rabbakum; lillazeena ahsanoo fee haazihid dunyaa hasanah; Wa-ardul laahi waasi'ah; innamaa yuwaffas saabiroona ajrahum bighayri hisab

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"Indeed, I have been commanded to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion.
tl: Qul inneee umirtu an a'budal laaha mukhlisal lahud deen

text: And I have been commanded to be the first [among you] of the Muslims.\"
tl: Wa-umirtu li-an akoona awwalal muslimeen

text: Say, \"Indeed I fear, if I should disobey my Lord, the punishment of a tremendous Day.\"
tl: Qul inneee akhaafu in 'asaitu Rabbee 'azaaba Yawmin 'azeem

text: Say, \"Allāh [alone] do I worship, sincere to Him in my religion,
tl: Qulil laaha a'budu mukhlisal lahoo deenee

text: So worship what you will besides Him.\" Say, \"Indeed, the losers are the ones who will lose themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, that is the manifest loss.\"
tl: Fa'budoo maa shi'tum min doonih; qul innal khaasireenal lazeena khasirooo anfusahum Wa-ahleehim yawmal qiyaamah; alaa zaalika huwal khusraanul mubeen

text: They will have canopies [i.e., layers] of fire above them and below them, canopies. By that Allāh threatens [i.e., warns] His servants. O My servants, then fear Me.
tl: Lahum min fawqihim zulalum minan Naari Wa-min tahtihim zulal; zaalika yukhaw-wiful laahu bihee 'ibaadah; yaa-'ibaadi fattaqoon

text: But those who have avoided ṭāghūt, lest they worship it, and turned back to Allāh - for them are good tidings. So give good tidings to My servants
tl: Wallazeenaj tanabut Taaghoota aien ya'budoohaa Wa-anaabooo ilal laahi lahumul bushraa; fabashshir 'ibaad

text: Who listen to speech and follow the best of it. Those are the ones Allāh has guided, and those are people of understanding.
tl: Allazeena yastami'oonal qawla fayattabi'oona ahsanah; ulaaa'ikal lazeena hadaahumul laahu Wa-ulaaa'ika hum ulul albaab

text: Then, is one who has deserved the decree of punishment [to be guided]? Then, can you save one who is in the Fire?
tl: Afaman haqqa 'alaihi kalimatul 'azaab; afa-anta tunqizu man fin Naar

text: But those who have feared their Lord - for them are chambers, above them chambers built high, beneath which rivers flow. [This is] the promise of Allāh. Allāh does not fail in [His] promise.
tl: Laakinil lazeenat taqaw Rabbahum lahum ghurafum min fawqihaa ghurafum mabniyyatun tajree min tahtihal anhaar; wa'dal laah; laa yukhliful laahul mee'aad

text: Do you not see that Allāh sends down rain from the sky and makes it flow as springs [and rivers] in the earth; then He produces thereby crops of varying colors; then they dry and you see them turned yellow; then He makes them [scattered] debris. Indeed in that is a reminder for those of understanding.
tl: Alam tara annal laaha anzala minas samaaa'i maaa'an fasalakahoo yanaabee'a fil ardi summa yukhriju bihee zar'am mukhtalifan alwaanuhoo summa yaheeju fatarahu musfarran summa yaj'aluhoo hutaamaa; inna fee zaalika lazikraa li-ulil albaab

text: So is one whose breast Allāh has expanded to [accept] Islām and he is upon [i.e., guided by] a light from his Lord [like one whose heart rejects it]? Then woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of Allāh. Those are in manifest error.
tl: Afaman sharahal laahu sadrahoo lil-Islaami fahuwa 'alaa noorim mir Rabbih; fa-wailul lilqaasiyati quloobuhum min zikril laah; ulaaa'ika fee dalaalim mubeen

text: Allāh has sent down the best statement: a consistent Book wherein is reiteration. The skins shiver therefrom of those who fear their Lord; then their skins and their hearts relax at the remembrance [i.e., mention] of Allāh. That is the guidance of Allāh by which He guides whom He wills. And one whom Allāh sends astray - for him there is no guide.
tl: Allahu nazzala ahsanal hadeesi Kitaabam mutashaa-biham masaaniya taqsha'irru minhu juloodul lazeena yakhshawna Rabbahum summa taleenu julooduhum Wa-quloo-buhum ilaa zikril laah; zaalika hudal laahi yahdee bihee maien yashaaa'; Wa-maien yudlilil laahu famaa lahoo min haad

text: Then is he who will shield with his face the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection [like one secure from it]? And it will be said to the wrongdoers, \"Taste what you used to earn.\"
tl: Afamaien yattaqee biwaj-hihee sooo'al 'azaabi Yawmal Qiyaamah; Wa-qeela lizzaali-meena zooqoo maa kuntum taksiboon

text: Those before them denied, and punishment came upon them from where they did not perceive.
tl: Kazzabal lazeena min qablihim fa-ataahumul 'azaabu min haisu laa yash'uroon

text: So Allāh made them taste disgrace in worldly life. But the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.
tl: Fa-azaaqahumul laahul khizya fil hayaatid dunyaa Wa-la'azaabul Aakhirati akbar; law kaanoo ya'lamoon

text: And We have certainly presented for the people in this Qur’ān from every [kind of] example - that they might remember.
tl: Wa-laqad darabnaa linnaasi fee haazal Qur-aani min kulli masalil la'allahum yatazakkaroon

text: [It is] an Arabic Qur’ān, without any deviance that they might become righteous.
tl: Qur-aanan 'Arabiyyan ghaira zee 'iwajil la'allahum yattaqoon

text: Allāh presents an example: a man [i.e., slave] owned by quarreling partners and another belonging exclusively to one man - are they equal in comparison? Praise be to Allāh! But most of them do not know.
tl: Darabal laahu masalar rajulan feehi shurakaaa'u mutashaakisoona Wa-rajulan salamal lirajulin hal yastawi-yaani masalaa; alhamdu lillaah; bal aksaruhum laa ya'lamoon

text: Indeed, you are to die, and indeed, they are to die.
tl: Innaka maiyitunw Wa-inna-hum maiyitoon

text: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, before your Lord, will dispute.
tl: Summa innakum Yawmal Qiyaamati 'inda Rabbikum takhtasimoon

text: So who is more unjust than one who lies about Allāh and denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a residence for the disbelievers?
tl: Faman azlamu mimman kazaba 'alal laahi Wa-kazzaba bissidqi iz jaaa'ah; alaisa fee Jahannama maswal lilkaafireen

text: And the one who has brought the truth [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)] and [they who] believed in it - those are the righteous.
tl: Wallazee jaaa'a bissidqi Wa-saddaqa biheee ulaaa'ika humul muttaqoon

text: They will have whatever they desire with their Lord. That is the reward of the doers of good -
tl: Lahum maa yashaaa'oona 'inda Rabbihim; zaalika jazaaa'ul muhsineen

text: That Allāh may remove from them the worst of what they did and reward them their due for the best of what they used to do.
tl: Liyukaffiral laahu 'anhum aswa allazee 'amiloo Wa-yajziyahum ajrahum bi-ahsanil lazee kaano ya'maloon

text: Is not Allāh sufficient for His Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)]? And [yet], they threaten you with those [they worship] other than Him. And whoever Allāh leaves astray - for him there is no guide.
tl: Alaisal laahu bikaafin 'abdahoo Wa-yukhawwi-foonaka billazeena min doonih; Wa-maien yudlilil laahu famaa lahoo min haad

text: And whoever Allāh guides - for him there is no misleader. Is not Allāh Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution?
tl: Wa-maien yahdil laahu famaa lahoo min mudil; alai-sal laahu bi'azeezin zin tiqaam

text: And if you asked them, \"Who created the heavens and the earth?\" they would surely say, \"Allāh.\" Say, \"Then have you considered what you invoke besides Allāh? If Allāh intended me harm, are they removers of His harm; or if He intended me mercy, are they withholders of His mercy?\" Say, \"Sufficient for me is Allāh; upon Him [alone] rely the [wise] reliers.\"
tl: Wa-la'in sa-altahum man khalaqas samaawaati wal-arda la-yaqoolunal laah; qul afara'aitum maa tad'oona min doonil laahi in araadaniyal laahu bidurrin hal hunna kaashi-faatu durriheee aw araadanee birahmatin hal hunna mumsikaatu rahmatih; qul hasbiyal laahu 'alaihi yatawakkalul mutawakkiloon

text: Say, \"O my people, work according to your position, [for] indeed, I am working; and you are going to know
tl: Qul yaa qawmi'maloo 'alaa makaanatikum innee 'aamilun fasawfa ta'lamoon

text: To whom will come a torment disgracing him and on whom will descend an enduring punishment.\"
tl: Maien yaateehi 'azaabunien yukhzeehi Wa-yahillu 'alaihi 'azaabum muqeem

text: Indeed, We sent down to you the Book for the people in truth. So whoever is guided - it is for [the benefit of] his soul; and whoever goes astray only goes astray to its detriment. And you are not a manager [i.e., authority] over them.
tl: Innaa anzalnaa 'alaikal Kitaaba linnaasi bilhaqq; famanih tadaa falinafsihee Wa-man dalla fa-innamaa yadillu 'alaihaa Wa-maaa anta 'alaihim biwakeel

text: Allāh takes the souls at the time of their death, and those that do not die [He takes] during their sleep. Then He keeps those for which He has decreed death and releases the others for a specified term. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.
tl: Allaahu yatawaffal anfusa heena mawtihaa wallatee lam tamut fee manaamihaa fa-yumsikul latee qadaa 'alaihal mawta Wa-yursilul ukhraaa ilaaa ajalim musammaa; inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil liqawmaien yatafakkarroon

text: Or have they taken other than Allāh as intercessors? Say, \"Even though they do not possess [power over] anything, nor do they reason?\"
tl: Amit takhazoo min doonil laahi shufa'aaa'; qul awalaw kaanoo laa yamlikoona shai'aw Wa-laa ya'qiloon

text: Say, \"To Allāh belongs [the right to allow] intercession entirely. To Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Then to Him you will be returned.\"
tl: Qul lillaahish shafaa'atu jamee'aa; lahoo mulkus samaawaati wal-ardi summa ilaihi turja'oon

text: And when Allāh is mentioned alone, the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter shrink with aversion, but when those [worshipped] other than Him are mentioned, immediately they rejoice.
tl: Wa-izaa zukiral laahu wahdahush ma-azzat quloobul lazeena laa yu'minoona bil-Aakhirati Wa-izaa zukiral lazeena min dooniheee izaa hum yastabshiroon

text: Say, \"O Allāh, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, You will judge between your servants concerning that over which they used to differ.\"
tl: Qulil laahumma faatiras samaawaati wal-ardi 'Aalimal Ghaibi washshahaadati Anta tahkumu baina 'ibaadika fee maa kaanoo feehee yakhtalifoon

text: And if those who did wrong had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it, they would [attempt to] ransom themselves thereby from the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection. And there will appear to them from Allāh that which they had not taken into account.
tl: Wa-law anna lillazeena zalamoo maa fil ardi jamee'anw Wa-mislahoo ma'ahoo laftadaw bihee min sooo'il azaabi Yawmal Qiyaamah; Wa-badaa lahum minal laahi maa lam yakkoonoo yahtasiboon

text: And there will appear to them the evils they had earned, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule.
tl: Wa-badaa lahum saiyiaatu maa kasaboo Wa-haaqa bihim maa kaanoo bihee yastahzi'oon

text: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon Us; then when We bestow on him a favor from Us, he says, \"I have only been given it because of [my] knowledge.\" Rather, it is a trial, but most of them do not know.
tl: Fa-izaa massal insaana durrun da'aanaa summa izaa khawwalnaahu ni'matam minna qaala innamaaa ootee-tuhoo 'alaa 'ilm; bal hiya fitna-tunw Wa-laakinna aksarahum laa ya'lamoon

text: Those before them had already said it, but they were not availed by what they used to earn.
tl: Qad qaalahal lazeena min qablihim famaaa aghnaa 'anhum maa kaanoo yaksiboon

text: And the evil consequences of what they earned struck them. And those who have wronged of these [people] will be struck [i.e., afflicted] by the evil consequences of what they earned; and they will not cause failure.
tl: Fa-asaabahum saiyyi-aatu maa kasaboo; wallazeena zalamoo min haaa'ulaaa'i sa-yuseebuhum saiyyi-aatu maa kasaboo Wa-maa hum bimu'jizeen

text: Do they not know that Allāh extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.
tl: Awalam ya'lamooo annal laaha yabsutur rizqa limai yashaaa'u Wa-yaqdir; inna fee zaalika la-Aayaatil liqawmien yu'minoon

text: Say, \"O My servants who have transgressed against themselves [by sinning], do not despair of the mercy of Allāh. Indeed, Allāh forgives all sins. Indeed, it is He who is the Forgiving, the Merciful.\"
tl: Qul yaa'ibaadiyal lazeena asrafoo 'alaaa anfusihim laa taqnatoo mir rahmatil laah; innal laaha yaghfiruz zunooba jamee'aa; innahoo Huwal Ghafoorur Raheem

text: And return [in repentance] to your Lord and submit to Him before the punishment comes upon you; then you will not be helped.
tl: Wa-aneebooo ilaa Rabbikum Wa-aslimoo lahoo min qabli ai yaatiyakumul 'azaabu summa laa tunsaroon

text: And follow the best of what was revealed to you from your Lord [i.e., the Qur’ān] before the punishment comes upon you suddenly while you do not perceive,
tl: Wattabi'ooo ahsana maaa unzila ilaikum mir Rabbikum min qabli aien yaatiyakumal 'azaabu baghtatanw Wa-antum laa tash'uroon

text: Lest a soul should say, \"Oh, [how great is] my regret over what I neglected in regard to Allāh and that I was among the mockers.\"
tl: An taqoola nafsuien yaahasrataa 'alaa maa farrattu fee jambil laahi Wa-in kuntu laminas saakhireen

text: Or [lest] it say, \"If only Allāh had guided me, I would have been among the righteous.\"
tl: Aw taqoola law annal laaha hadaanee lakuntu minal muttaqeen

text: Or [lest] it say when it sees the punishment, \"If only I had another turn so I could be among the doers of good.\"
tl: Aw taqoola heena taral 'azaaba law anna lee karratan fa-akoona minal muhsineen

text: But yes, there had come to you My verses, but you denied them and were arrogant, and you were among the disbelievers.
tl: Balaa qad jaaa'atka aayaatee fa-kazzabta bihaa Wa-stakbarta Wa-kunta minal kaafireen

text: And on the Day of Resurrection you will see those who lied about Allāh [with] their faces blackened. Is there not in Hell a residence for the arrogant?
tl: Wa-Yawmal Qiyaamati taral lazeena kazaboo 'alal laahi wujoohuhum muswaddah; alaisa fee Jahannama maswal lilmutakabbireen

text: And Allāh will save those who feared Him by their attainment; no evil will touch them, nor will they grieve.
tl: Wa-yunajjil laahul lazee-nat taqaw bimafaazatihim laa yamassuhumus sooo'u Wa-laa hum yahzanoon

text: Allāh is the Creator of all things, and He is, over all things, Disposer of affairs.
tl: Allaahu khaaliqu kulli shai'inw Wa-Huwa 'alaa kulli shai'inw Wakeel

text: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth. And they who disbelieve in the verses of Allāh - it is those who are the losers.
tl: Lahoo maqaaleedus sa-maawaati wal-ard; wallazeena kafaroo bi-ayaatil laahi ulaaa'ika humul khaasiroon

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"Is it other than Allāh that you order me to worship, O ignorant ones?\"
tl: Qul afaghairal laahi taamurooonneee a'budu ayyuhal jaahiloon

text: And it was already revealed to you and to those before you that if you should associate [anything] with Allāh, your work would surely become worthless, and you would surely be among the losers.
tl: Wa-laqad oohiya ilaika Wa-ilal lazeena min qablika la-in ashrakta la-yahbatanna 'amalu-ka Wa-latakoonanna minal khaasireen

text: Rather, worship [only] Allāh and be among the grateful.
tl: Balil laahha fa'bud Wa-kum minash shaakireen

text: They have not appraised Allāh with true appraisal, while the earth entirely will be [within] His grip on the Day of Resurrection, and the heavens will be folded in His right hand. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.
tl: Wa-maa qadarul laaha haqqa qadrihee wal-ardu jamee-'an qabdatuhoo Yawmal Qiyaamati wassamaawaatu matwiyyaatum biyameenih; Subhaanahoo Wa-Ta'aalaa 'amma yushrikoon

text: And the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will fall dead except whom Allāh wills. Then it will be blown again, and at once they will be standing, looking on.
tl: Wa-nufikha fis Soori fasa'iqa man fis samaawaati Wa-man fil ardi illaa man shaa'al lahu summa nufikha feehi ukhraa fa-izaa hum qiyaamuny yanzuroon

text: And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord, and the record [of deeds] will be placed, and the prophets and the witnesses will be brought, and it will be judged between them in truth, and they will not be wronged.
tl: Wa-ashraqatil ardu binoori Rabbihaa Wa-wudi'al Kitaabu Wa-jeee'a bin-nabiyyeena wash-shuhadaaa'i Wa-qudiya bainahum bilhaqqi Wa-hum laa yuzlamoon

text: And every soul will be fully compensated [for] what it did; and He is most knowing of what they do.
tl: Wa-wuffiyat kullu nafsim maa 'amilat Wa-Huwa a'lamu bimaa yaf'aloon

text: And those who disbelieved will be driven to Hell in groups until, when they reach it, its gates are opened and its keepers will say, \"Did there not come to you messengers from yourselves, reciting to you the verses of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this Day of yours?\" They will say, \"Yes, but the word [i.e., decree] of punishment has come into effect upon the disbelievers.\"
tl: Wa-seeqal lazeena kafaroo ilaa jahannama zumaraa hattaaa izaa jaaa'oohaa futihat abwaabuhaa Wa-qaala lahum khazanatuhaaa alam ya'tikum Rusulun minkum yatloona 'alaikum Aayaati Rabbikum Wa-yunziroonakum liqaaa'a Yawmikum haazaa; qaaloo balaa Wa-laakin haqqat kalimatul 'azaabi 'alal kaafireen

text: [To them] it will be said, \"Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant.\"
tl: Qeelad khuloo abwaaba jahannama khaalideena feeha fabi'sa maswal mutakabbireen

text: But those who feared their Lord will be driven to Paradise in groups until, when they reach it while its gates have been opened and its keepers say, \"Peace be upon you; you have become pure; so enter it to abide eternally therein,\" [they will enter].
tl: Wa-seeqal lazeenat taqaw Rabbahum ilal Jannati zumaraa hattaaa izaa jaaa'oohaa Wa-futihat abwaabuhaa Wa-qaala lahum khazanatuhaa salaamun 'alaikum tibtum fadkhuloohaa khaalideen

text: And they will say, \"Praise to Allāh, who has fulfilled for us His promise and made us inherit the earth [so] we may settle in Paradise wherever we will. And excellent is the reward of [righteous] workers.\"
tl: Wa-qaalull hamdulillaahil lazee sadaqanaa wa'dahoo Wa-awrasanal arda natabaw wa-u minal jannati haisu nashaaa'u fani'ma ajrul 'aamileen

text: And you will see the angels surrounding the Throne, exalting [Allāh] with praise of their Lord. And it will be judged between them in truth, and it will be said, \"[All] praise to Allāh, Lord of the worlds.\"
tl: Wa-taral malaaa'ikata haaaffeena min hawlil 'Arshi yusabbihoona bihamdi Rabbihim Wa-qudiya bainahum bilhaqqi Wa-qeelal hamdu lillaahi Rabbil 'aalameen
